final:
module binary_up_counter_4bit (
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
        q <= 4'b0000;
    end else begin
        q <= q + 1;
    end
end

endmodule
